## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what changes, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Network profile improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] `python tools/release_check.py` returns status `ok`.
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes.
- [ ] No customer package IDs, emails, proxy URLs, or API keys in any file.
- [ ] If user-visible behavior changed, both `README.md` and `README.zh-CN.md` were updated together.
- [ ] If a skill's behavior changed, its `metadata.json` is still accurate.
- [ ] This change does not duplicate commercial-edition features (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
